title: Perfect Java
description: A highly optimized and visually enhanced modpack
body:
![Perfect Java Modpack image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e82584159854aedabb87628ee571d694fadd6dfd.webp)
---
- **Perfect Java** is optimized for mid to high-end hardware. 
- On release r1.4.1+mc26.1.2 you can have a custom cape using [MinecraftCapes Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraftcapes)
- It`s shader ready with (**[iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)** pre-installed)
- It has resource packs like [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) and [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)
- It has Optimazation mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- It has visual mods too, like [Particular ✨](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular)


## Pre-downloaded Shaders
- [Bliss Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader)
- [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
- [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound)
- [E-LITE shaders (MakeUp edit)](https://modrinth.com/shader/lite-shaders)
- [Photon Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader/gallery)
- [RenderPearl](https://modrinth.com/shader/renderpearl)
- [Solas Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader)
- [Super Duper Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/shader/super-duper-vanilla)

## Credits
### Based on [Vanilla Perfected](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-perfected)

> The ultimate **performance** & **quality-of-life** modpack for Minecraft enthusiasts who want the best of both worlds.  
> Optimized for smooth FPS, immersive visuals, and powerful utility features – all while staying close to the **vanilla feel**.
